# JSON Web Tokens for testing
# HS256 token (synthetic)
JWT_TOKEN=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIiwibmFtZSI6IkpvaG4gRG9lIiwiaWF0IjoxNTE2MjM5MDIyfQ.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c
# In HTTP header
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIiwibmFtZSI6IlRlc3QgVXNlciJ9.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ01234567890abcdef
# In config
token = eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJkYXRhIjoidGVzdCJ9.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz
# OAuth bearer token (non-JWT)
Authorization: Bearer abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF
